pi_items.source: Code analysis: task.json (line 5), setup_task.sh (line 17), verifier.py (line 56), export_result.sh (line 13)
Code analysis: task.json metadata, verifier.py line 106 checks for 'Magento_Sales::view' or 'Magento_Sales::actions_view'
Code analysis: task.json metadata, verifier.py line 108 checks for 'Magento_CatalogInventory::inventory' or 'Magento_CatalogInventory::products'
Code analysis: install_magento.sh line 163 installs magento/project-community-edition=2.4.7
Code analysis: setup_magento.sh lines 16-17, task.json description mentions Admin1234!, setup_task.sh line 11

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a REST API integration in Magento Open Source 2.4.7 with the name 'FastTrack_Logistics' and email 'api@fasttrack.com'. The integration must have restricted resource access (Custom) limited to two specific resource nodes: Magento_Sales::view (for viewing orders) and Magento_CatalogInventory::inventory (for inventory access). The task verifies successful creation by checking: integration existence (20 pts), correct email (10 pts), active status confirming activation was completed (30 pts), OAuth token generation (10 pts), and proper resource permissions (30 pts). Pass threshold is 70 points. Admin login credentials are admin / Admin1234!.
